name: ad-4-hatman
description: Hatman / sleep paralysis — single 10s Kling multi-shot from one POV image: calm whisper + scare + camera-pan reveal of hatman in the SAME doorway visible in frame from start. Plus 5s real iPhone screen recording. Hooks based on r/Dreams verbatim.

data.prompt:
Vertical 9:16 hyperrealistic iPhone front-camera selfie. A strikingly beautiful young woman in her early 20s — naturally pretty, soft delicate features, model-tier bone structure but in a real, untouched-up way — is lying ON HER SIDE in bed at night, head resting on a soft white pillow, cheek pressed gently against the pillow. She holds her iPhone in one hand a few inches in front of her face, looking sideways into the camera. The composition is intimate, close, like she's whispering a secret to a friend at 3 AM.

FRAMING: she occupies the LEFT half of the frame. Behind her head, in the UPPER-RIGHT corner of the frame, a partially-visible OPEN BEDROOM DOORWAY is clearly in shot — empty doorway, dark hallway beyond, faint warm tungsten hallway light spilling through and outlining the door frame. The doorway must be visible from the very first frame.

LIGHTING: the only light source is the phone screen itself, casting cool blue-white light across her cheek, jawline, the tip of her nose and her lips. The rest of the bedroom plunges into deep shadow. The pillow under her cheek catches a soft halo of phone-glow. Warm tungsten hallway light visible through the open doorway in the upper-right corner.

FACE — extreme photorealism, beautiful but real: smooth porcelain skin with visible natural pores across her cheek and nose, a delicate scattering of light freckles across her nose-bridge and upper cheek, long natural eyelashes, slightly arched eyebrows, full natural lips with a soft pink tone (no lipstick), tiny natural imperfections — one small freckle near her jawline, the faintest dark circle under her eye from being woken up. Half-parted lips as if mid-whisper. Her eyes are wide, slightly scared, pupils dilated from the dark, gaze locked directly into the camera lens. Beautiful but vulnerable.

HAIR: long, soft, dark-blonde or warm-brown bed-hair fanned out across the pillow, a few strands falling across her cheek and into the corner of her mouth, slightly tousled but flattering — not greasy, just natural sleep-hair.

WARDROBE: thin cream cotton t-shirt or oversized hoodie visible at the collarbone, no jewelry, no makeup.

CAMERA: vertical 9:16, iPhone 15 Pro front-camera aesthetic, slight low-light noise, shallow depth of field with the pillow texture slightly blurred at the edges, micro-motion blur from her unsteady hand holding the phone. Subtle iPhone night-mode grain across the whole frame, but face stays sharp.

NO logos, no text, no captions, no watermarks. Authentic 3 AM personal recording vibe — looks like a real phone selfie, not a studio shot. Beautiful, intimate, slightly scared. Doorway visible upper-right.
data.label: POV selfie — phone-lit face + doorway in corner

shots.prompt: POV iPhone selfie — beautiful young woman lying on her side, cheek on white pillow, phone held in front of her face, screen-glow lighting her. Empty open doorway visible behind her in the upper-right corner of the frame, dim warm hallway light. She whispers calmly, intimately to camera, lips moving softly: 'ok hear me out... so I had sleep paralysis last night and there was a man in a hat standing in the doorway.' She moves naturally — slow blinks, slight head shifts on pillow, hair strand drifting on cheek, subtle phone-hand micro-shake. Camera stays close on her face, mostly framing the LEFT half of the frame on her, with the doorway visible behind. Sound: very close-mic intimate whisper, faint bedroom room tone, no music. Vertical 9:16, iPhone night-mode grain.

Direct continuation — same young woman, same pillow, same selfie POV. She continues whispering 'I just googled it. apparently this guy shows up to people all over the world. like the sa—' Then SUDDENLY stops mid-word. Her eyes snap sharply, gaze darts past the camera up and to her right (toward the doorway). Sharp tiny breath in. Her hand jolts and the phone wobbles for half a second. Then the camera SMOOTHLY ROTATES AND PIVOTS away from her face, following her terrified gaze, panning across the dim bedroom toward the open doorway in the corner. As the camera arrives at the doorway, what was empty seconds ago now reveals: a tall thin silhouette of a man wearing a wide-brimmed fedora hat — completely faceless, motionless, slightly blurred at the edges as if not fully real, lit faintly from behind by warm tungsten hallway light. The hatman stands still in the doorframe. Camera holds on him, slight handheld shake, intimate breath audible. Sound: whisper cuts to held breath and silence, very faint shaky breathing, no music, no other ambient noise. Vertical 9:16, iPhone night-mode grain, low-light noise. The doorway and bedroom geometry stay consistent with the opening shot — same room, same doorway, just now the man is there.

data.label: Single 10s clip — multi-shot: whisper → scare → pan to hatman
📼 Upload iPhone screen recording (Dream app, 5s, voiceover synced)
Stitch — Kling clip + Screen recording (hard cut)

meta.format: Single 10s Kling multi-shot (whisper → scare → camera-pan to hatman in doorway) + 5s real iPhone screen recording = 15s total
